description_long: This house features a compact, rectangular structure with a steeply pitched, dark blue gable roof and white trim. The facade is adorned with symmetrical windows and a central entryway, flanked by small columns and a modest porch. The exterior walls are painted in a muted blue-gray tone, contrasting with the white window frames and door. Surrounding the house is a circular patch of green lawn, bordered by evenly spaced, slender trees or shrubs. The roof includes a prominent central dormer, adding architectural interest and additional upper-level space. The overall design is reminiscent of a classic American suburban home, with clean lines and balanced proportions.
description: A small, blue-gray house with a steep gable roof, white trim, and symmetrical windows, set on a circular green lawn with surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a porch, central door, and symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back wall with windows and the surrounding trees more visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the depth of the house, the gable roof, and the central dormer.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the side windows and the green lawn border.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small porch, flanked by columns and steps, white trim, and a modest overhang.
